name: @vanillagreen/pi-flightdeck
description: Read-only sessions-first dashboard for the flightdeck skill: owner-scoped overview of tracked sessions, daemon health, decisions log, and a prominent pause banner when master is awaiting the user.

settings.label: Enable flightdeck dashboard
settings.description: Register /flightdeck command, owner-scoped persistent session dashboard, and pause banner.

settings.label: Popup shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens the full flightdeck session-control popup. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Dashboard cycle shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that cycles the persistent dashboard widget through hidden → compact → expanded. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Show dashboard widget
settings.description: Render a persistent sessions dashboard above the owner editor when a Flightdeck session is active.

settings.label: Dashboard visibility
settings.description: Where the persistent dashboard widget may render: owner pane only (default), any pane in the same tmux session, or always when state is readable. Child panes remain suppressed.

settings.label: Dashboard default state
settings.description: Initial dashboard state when a flightdeck session first appears.

settings.label: Dashboard max sessions
settings.description: Maximum tracked-session rows shown in the persistent dashboard widget. Existing dashboardMaxItems settings continue to apply; only the label changed.

settings.label: Dashboard stale-after (min)
settings.description: Treat the dashboard as stale (suppress session tree, show a one-line hint) when the daemon is dead AND the most recent session poll is older than this many minutes. Set 0 to disable stale detection and always render leftover state as live.

settings.label: Show pause banner
settings.description: Render a high-contrast banner above the editor whenever flightdeck master sets paused_for_user. Banner clears automatically when master resumes.

settings.label: Terminal bell on pause
settings.description: Ring the terminal bell once when paused_for_user is first detected.

settings.label: Auto-open popup on pause
settings.description: Automatically open the /flightdeck popup once when paused_for_user is first detected. The banner is shown either way.

settings.label: Refresh interval
settings.description: How often (ms) the dashboard, banner, and popup re-read flightdeck state files.

settings.label: Live feed lines
settings.description: Number of daemon log + tracked-session decision lines retained in the popup Live feed tab.

settings.label: Conversation excerpt chars
settings.description: Maximum characters of last assistant text retained per tracked session in the Conversations tab.

settings.label: Conversations turns kept
settings.description: Number of recent assistant turns retained per tracked session in the Conversations tab. Rows resolve to tracked-session titles when available.

settings.label: Tree connector style
settings.description: Connector glyphs for the dashboard widget. Unicode is prettier; ASCII uses |--/`-- for maximum terminal compatibility.

settings.label: Daemon state dir override
settings.description: Override for FD_STATE_DIR resolution. Leave empty to use the same resolution flightdeck-daemon uses ($XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/flightdeck or /tmp/flightdeck-$UID). Daemon tuning env vars such as FD_OC_BACKOFF_MAX_SEC are configured outside this read-only extension.

settings.label: Master state dir (project-relative)
settings.description: Directory inside the project root that holds the flightdeck master state file. Matches FLIGHTDECK_STATE_DIR (default tmp).

resources.name: /flightdeck:toggle
resources.description: Cycle the persistent flightdeck dashboard widget.

author: vanillagreen
